name: Vermicelli W/Tomatoes & Chipotle Chiles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound vermicelli, broken into small pieces
3 medium tomatoes, peeled and coarsely chopped
1 teaspoon fresh oregano leaves or 1/2 tsp. dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot.
2. Add the vermicelli and stir-fry over high heat until well-coated and starting to turn golden, about 1 minute.
3. Add onion and garlic and continue stirring until the onion wilts slightly, about 1 minute.
4. Add the tomatoes, chipotle chiles, oregano, salt, and pepper, and simmer until the tomatoes wilt, about 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 15 minutes (add more stock if necessary during cooking).
7. Transfer to a serving dish and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, if desired. Serve immediately.
